---
title: "Evidence_2"
author: "Jorlen Moreno"
date: "2026-05-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Load the necessary libraries
```{r}
library(Biostrings)
library(ape)
library(seqinr)
```


Load the sequences
```{r}
seqs <- readDNAStringSet("sequences.fasta")
seqs

```

Identify geographical region
```{r}
metadata <- read.delim("Accesion numbers.txt", header = TRUE)
View(metadata)

```

Get the complementarty sequence
```{r}
complementary_seqs <- Biostrings::complement(seqs)
sub_complementary <- Biostrings::subseq(complementary_seqs, start = 1, end = 30)
print(sub_complementary)
```

Nucleotide compositon
```{r}
base_freqs <- Biostrings::alphabetFrequency(seqs, baseOnly = TRUE)
pure_freqs <- base_freqs[, c("A", "C", "G", "T")]
dist_matrix <- dist(pure_freqs)
print(as.matrix(dist_matrix))
```


```{r}
composition <- t(sapply(seqs, function(seq) {
  table(factor(seq, levels = c("a", "c", "g", "t")))
}))
print(composition)
```

```{r}
lengths <- width(seqs)
barplot(lengths, names.arg = names(seqs), 
        main = "Length comparison",
         col = hcl.colors(4, "Plasma"),, las = 2, cex.names = 0.7)
```

```{r}
final_distance <- as.dist(as.matrix(dist_matrix))
arbol <- ape::nj(final_distance)
par(mar=c(1,1,2,1)) 
plot(arbol, 
     main = "Phylogenetic tree",
     edge.width = 2,
     cex = 0.8)

add.scale.bar()
```
